commitMapping: Each entry maps to the Git commit whose subject exactly matches commitSubject.

entries.summary: Established a conflict-safe standalone release repository with one JSON roadmap, machine-readable handoff and changelog, frozen source-input hashes, non-overlapping scope contracts, explicit Git ownership, and release security boundaries.
verification: Roadmap validation and next-step query passed.
Dispatch-wave validation passed with no conflicts.
Secret, binary, cache, toolchain, agent-log, and local-input ignore probes passed.
